div1.entryFree: Treat, vb. to discourse, to speak, to have for subject: say what the play --s on, Mids. I, 2, 9. that part of philosophy that --s of happiness, Shr. I, 1, 19. --s of Tereus' treason, Tit. IV, 1, 48. to t. with == to negotiate with: there with the emperor to t. of high affairs, John I, 101.
